---
title: Add a SearchInput
description: Add a simple search field that redirects to the search page on submit.
---

import { Aside } from "@astrojs/starlight/components"

Use `SearchInput` when you want a simple, single-field search anywhere on a page. 
When a user submits a term, they are redirected to the search page with the query applied.

## Behavior

- Submitting a term navigates to the search page with that term applied.
- Honors the current locale so results open at the localized search route.
- Can be placed anywhere in a page layout (e.g., hero, or within a section).

<Aside type="tip">
 To build links to the search page with preset filters from code, use `searchPagePath` from `lightnet/utils`. See
[Create internal links](/build/pages/create-internal-links).
</Aside>

## Reference

The `SearchInput` component focuses on behavior rather than configuration and works without props.
These optional props cover common needs:

### `className`

type: `string` \
example: `"mt-4"` \
required: `false`

Additional css classes, separated by spaces, to style the input For example set this to `"max-w-md"` if you want to 
constraint the maximum width.
